311.reason: [Incorrectly adds AND token for single '&' which should not be tokenized as '&&'; should either skip or handle as invalid character without adding wrong token]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds AND token for single '&' which should not be tokenized as '&&'; should either skip or handle as invalid character without adding wrong token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly creates "&&" token for single '&' which should not be tokenized as AND; should either create a different token or handle as invalid character]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly creates an AND token for single '&' which should not be tokenized as a valid operator; should either skip or handle differently while reporting error 'a']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds "&&" token for single '&' which should not be treated as AND operator; should either add single '&' as invalid or not add any token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds "&&" token when only single '&' is present; should not add any token for invalid single '&']
